steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants an example of a particle physicist whose research focuses on neutrinos. A good sentence must name an individual physicist and connect that person to neutrino research.

steps.title: Require a named physicist
steps.content: Choice A discusses neutrino research generally. Choice B describes what particle physicists can study as a group. Choice D defines neutrinos without naming any physicist. The remaining choice names Victor Halvorsen and links him to high-energy astrophysical neutrinos. The answer is C.
